articles.title: Duran and Contreras drive in 3 runs apiece as Red Sox beat Royals 7-1
articles.description:
Duran was 2 for 3 with two walks and Isiah Kiner-Falefa went 3 for 3 with a walk. Ceddanne Rafaela and Wilyer Abreu had two hits apiece.

articles.title: Red Sox beat Royals 3-1 behind Willson Contreras’ homer and Sonny Gray’s strong outing
articles.description:
Gray (5-1) allowed one run on five hits in six-plus innings. He struck out nine and walked one. He has given up two runs over 16 innings (1.13 ERA) since returning from the injured list on May 6.
